meta.title: Watch SpaceX Launch NASA's CRS-16 and have a failed landing attempt!
meta.description:
NASA is paying SpaceX to launch a Dragon on a resupply mission to the International Space Station. In February of 2016, NASA extended the CRS-1 contract with SpaceX to include 5 additional resupply missions. CRS 16 is the first of those five.

Want more info? Here's a complete and simple rundown for you! - https://everydayastronaut.com/prelaunch-preview-spacex-crs-16/

Brand new shop now open! - http://shop.everydayastronaut.com
